hero.subtext: Registered massage and manual osteopathic therapy tailored to your body's unique needs. Treating the root cause of your discomfort, not just the symptoms.

about.bio: Hi there!! I'm a passionate Registered Massage Therapist and Manual Osteopathic Therapist based in Saskatoon, SK. I specialize in therapeutic treatment that works with all systems of the body to find the root cause of your pain or dysfunction. Whether you're dealing with chronic tension, injury recovery, postural issues, or stress, I strive to create a personalized treatment plan to help rid you of your discomfort!
about.credentials: Registered Massage Therapist (RMT) & Manual Osteopathic Therapist (MOT)
about.location: Integrative Therapies Health Collective, 1647 29th St W, Saskatoon, SK

bookingCta.heading: Book Your Session
bookingCta.subtext: Online booking is fast and easy through Jane App. Prefer to reach out first? Text us for the fastest response.
